titleStmt.title: SII 36.294: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 294. (A.R. No. 294 of 1910.) PULIPPARKŌYIL, MADHURANTAKAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Vyāghrapādēśvara temple.

summary.p: Records that, a reduction of the levy called vāchalpaṇam was granted by the king, on a request preferred by the residents of tirumaḍaiviḷāgam of the temple of Pulipparkōil, while the king was on a visit to the Chandragiri-cāvaḍi. Accordingly, the Taṉattār of the temple reduced the rates of vāchalpaṇam on looms (taṟi), betel leaf sellers (cēṉaikkadai), oil mongers (kachchavaḍa-vāṇiyar), fishermen (śivaṉpaḍavar) and other communities settled in the tirumaḍaiviḷāgam of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī man mahāmaṇḍalīcuraṉ śrī vīra vijayapūpatirāya Uṭaiyaṟkkuc cellāniṉṟa Eviḷampi varuṣam tai māsam 5 ntiyati Uṭaiyār tiruppulippa
kava nāyiṉar tirumaṭaiviḷākam pulippakavar koyil tāṉattār Ivvūr kaikkoḷarkku kalveṭṭik kuṭuttapaṭi nāṭṭil koyippaṟṟa Aṟṟamari
āti vācalppaṇam kaḻikkaveṇum Eṉṟu puṟanāṭṭile cantirakiric cāvaṭiile poyirukkaiil pūrvvattil kaṭamai ø9(1/2)kku taṟikaṇṭavācaluk
ku vācalpaṇa mūṉṟum kaḻittu kaṇṭataṟikku taṟi Oṉṟukkuk koḷḷum ø 6(1/2) ceṉaikkaṭaikkum vācal ø3m kaḻittuk koḷḷum
ø6(1/2) kaccavaṭavāṇiyar per Oṉṟukkuk koḷḷum ø3 civaṉpaṭavar per Oṉṟukku koḷḷum ø2(1/2) muṉṉāḷ tāṉattārkku naṭantu
varum puṭavai mutalu ø 4 10m kārttikai kāṇikkaikku ø4m Iṟukka kaṭavārkaḷ Ākavum Upāti viniyokam nāṭṭil koyilppaṟṟu
Aṟṟa mariāti Iṟukkak kaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum Immariāti cantrādityavaraiyum naṭakkum paṭikkuk kal veṭṭikkuṭuttom Ivvūr Ūravaṟku
Uṭaiyārt tiruppulippakava nāyiṉār koyil tāṉattārom śrī māheśvararo rakṣai Ālālacuntaraṉ
Digital edition of SII 36.294 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
